title: Studi Kasus: Prediksi Berbasis Lokasi dan Klasifikasi Simpul
scope: Case study: location-based prediction & node classification (one per half).
key_concepts: Spatial Case: Predicting house prices using raw coordinates vs. spatial proximity features. Demonstrates how designed distance/neighborhood features drastically improve standard tree-based model performance, and highlights spatial cross-validation blocking.

Graph Case: Node classification on a citation network (e.g., Cora). Compares a baseline using only handcrafted degree features against Node2Vec embeddings and a GNN. Shows how message passing captures topology better than raw counts.
examples: Spatial: House price prediction using a Random Forest. Baseline is just lat/lon. Enhanced model uses 'distance to park' and spatial lag.
Graph: Paper topic classification. Baseline uses in-degree/out-degree. Enhanced model uses a simple GNN embedding.

code_placeholders.callout: [KODE: Pemisahan data latih dan uji menggunakan spatial block cross-validation untuk mencegah kebocoran spasial; sumber: notebook bab 13]
code_placeholders.description: Menunjukkan pemisahan data berdasarkan blok koordinat spasial alih-alih acak k-fold.

exclude: Code blocks written out, complex data loading steps.
relations: Synthesizes the spatial half (s01-s03) and graph half (s04-s08). Points to the chapter notebook for implementation details.
